name: meta-kim
description: Cross-runtime Meta_Kim prompt pack for Claude Code, OpenClaw, and Codex.

scripts.build:agent-foundry: node scripts/generate-industry-agents.mjs && node scripts/compile-foundry-runtime-packs.mjs && npm run build:flagships
scripts.check:agent-foundry: node scripts/generate-industry-agents.mjs --check && node scripts/compile-foundry-runtime-packs.mjs --check && npm run check:flagships
scripts.build:flagships: node scripts/build-flagship-batch-1.mjs && node scripts/build-flagship-batch-2.mjs && node scripts/build-flagship-batch-3.mjs && node scripts/build-flagship-batch-4.mjs
scripts.check:flagships: node scripts/build-flagship-batch-1.mjs --check && node scripts/build-flagship-batch-2.mjs --check && node scripts/build-flagship-batch-3.mjs --check && node scripts/build-flagship-batch-4.mjs --check
scripts.check: npm run check:runtimes && npm run validate && npm run check:agent-foundry
scripts.verify:all: npm run check && npm run eval:agents

author: KimYx0207
